metadata.lyrics:
[00:30.30] Everybody dance, do-do-do
[00:33.36] Clap your hands, clap your hands

[01:07.46] Dancing helps relieve the pain
[01:10.56] Soothes your mind, makes you happy again
[01:15.15] Listen to those dancing feet close your eyes and let go
